policy: A blocker is closed only by evidence at the exact blocked step. Do not infer completion from repository files or adjacent successes.

blockers.title: No genuinely newer ChatGPT export
blockers.exact_unblock_input: A ChatGPT export generated after 2026-06-25 or an explicit later-chat source pack.
blockers.rollback: Remove only derived delta artifacts; preserve raw archive and prior manifests.

blockers.title: Eight shared ChatGPT links are inaccessible
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Accessible conversation exports, copied transcripts or files containing the eight chat bodies and attachments.
blockers.rollback: Mark derived records superseded if later canonical exports conflict.

blockers.title: 83 XRP Tracking New direct bodies unavailable
blockers.exact_unblock_input: The 83 direct conversation bodies from the project export or equivalent source pack.

blockers.title: Tax direct batch unavailable
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Eight Tax chat bodies and any referenced documents.

blockers.title: Active Trust direct batch unavailable
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Seventeen Active Trust chat bodies and referenced trust/deed documents.

blockers.title: Finance Planning direct batch unavailable
blockers.exact_unblock_input: 132 Finance Planning chat bodies and referenced finance files.

blockers.title: Financial New direct batch unavailable
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Twelve Financial New chat bodies and referenced files.
proof_required: overlap and supersession map against Finance Planning and Bill CFO

blockers.title: Longevity direct batch unavailable
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Six Longevity Plan chat bodies and referenced health files.
blockers.owner: User/source owner and appropriate health professional where required

blockers.title: Hub DigitalOcean runtime recovery
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Authorised DigitalOcean Recovery Console access and runtime ownership confirmation.

blockers.title: Historical VTI token rotation
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Provider-owner revocation and replacement through the provider secret manager.

blockers.title: Jarvis Health Railway runtime proof
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Authoritative Railway service/domain, scoped secret references and privacy approval.
blockers.owner: Railway project owner and Health data authority

blockers.title: Property Sheets webhook fallback proof
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Approved Apps Script/Railway configuration and non-sensitive test sheet.

blockers.title: Hub deployment/Gmail proof workflow
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Authorised dispatch of the current workflow with read-only provider scopes.
required_steps: do not send external mail without explicit approval

blockers.title: Protected VTI Cobalt canary
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Approved protected-host credentials and authorised synthetic canary source.

blockers.title: VTI-to-Hub staging federation
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Approved HTTPS staging endpoint and shared signing-secret reference in both secret stores.

blockers.title: Command Centre authenticated staging
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Approved staging environment, identity provider, secret references, observability and rollback owner.

blockers.title: External 18-layer digital twin connection
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Approved endpoints, IAM/service identities, databases, provider credentials, budgets/cost ceilings and rollback ownership.
required_steps: connect one layer at a time
blockers.owner: Infrastructure, security, cost and release authorities

blockers.title: Production promotion not authorised
blockers.exact_unblock_input: Passing P0-P5 evidence, residual-risk acceptance, approved budget and explicit owner production approval.

truth_boundary: This register makes every known blocker actionable and auditable. It does not itself supply inaccessible sources, credentials, provider access or owner acceptance.
